Testing.simpleKey: This is a simple key for testing purposes.
Testing.noPluralKey: This key does not support pluralization.

Frontend.offlineNotifyAndFediverse: This stream is offline. You can be notified the next time {{streamer}} goes live or follow {{fediverseAccount}} on the Fediverse.
Frontend.offlineNotifyOnly: This stream is offline. Be notified the next time {{streamer}} goes live.
Frontend.offlineFediverseOnly: This stream is offline. Follow {{fediverseAccount}} on the Fediverse to see the next time {{streamer}} goes live.
Frontend.offlineBasic: This stream is offline. Check back soon!
Frontend.browser_notify_unsupported: Browser notifications are not supported in your browser.
Frontend.browser_notify_unsupported_local: Browser notifications are not supported for local servers.
Frontend.browser_notify_ios_description: It takes a couple extra steps to make sure you get notified when your favorite streams go live.
Frontend.browser_notify_ios_name_and_tap: Give this link a name and tap the new icon on your home screen
Frontend.browser_notify_ios_come_back: Come back to this screen and enable notifications.
Frontend.browser_notify_enabled_description: To disable push notifications from {{hostname}} access your browser permissions for this site and turn off notifications. Learn more.
Frontend.browser_notify_denied_title: Notifications are blocked on your device
Frontend.browser_notify_denied_description: To enable push notifications from {{hostname}} access your browser permissions for this site and turn on notifications. Then reload this page to apply your updated settings on this site. Learn more.
Frontend.browser_notify_main_description: Get notified right in the browser each time this stream goes live.
Frontend.browser_notify_error_message: Error registering for live notifications: {{message}}. Make sure you're not inside a private browser environment or have previously disabled notifications for this stream.

EditInstanceDetails.offlineMessageDescription: The offline message is displayed to your page visitors when you're not streaming. Markdown is supported.
EditInstanceDetails.directoryDescription: Increase your audience by appearing in the Owncast Directory. This is an external service run by the Owncast project. Learn more.
EditInstanceDetails.serverUrlRequiredForDirectory: You must set your Server URL above to enable the directory.
